summary: Professional tarot reading and crystal shop website for Mystic Moon with Ishita, featuring about section with 4 years healing experience, product gallery with crystals and bracelets (₹900+ pricing), Instagram integration, and 35 customer reviews
architectural_notes: E-commerce functionality for crystal and bracelet shopping
Product image gallery with professional photography
Integration with existing website at mysticmoonwithishita-2kv.caffeine.xyz

existing_features.title: Add Instagram social link to @MysticMoonWithIshita in the website header or footer
Create an About section describing Ishita as a genuine healer with strong intuition and 4 years of experience in tarot reading, emphasizing authenticity and healing abilities
Add 35 customer reviews from different people spanning January to present, covering both tarot reading sessions and crystal product purchases
Create a product catalog featuring all types of crystals and crystal bracelets with high-quality professional product images
Implement product pricing system with base price of ₹500 plus ₹400 markup, resulting in minimum price of ₹900, with prices displayed in Indian Rupees
Design a cohesive mystical visual theme with warm earth tones, celestial accents, and elegant typography that reflects spiritual healing and crystal energy aesthetics
Render all generated product images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated directory

Integrate any unique sections, features, or content from the external Mystic Moon website into the current site while maintaining the existing mystical visual theme with warm earth tones and celestial accents

If the external website contains additional products, services, or business information not present in the current site, integrate them into the appropriate sections (product catalog, services list, or about section)
Ensure the merged website presents a unified, professional business identity under the name MysticMoonWithIshita.com with consistent branding, messaging, and user experience throughout
